name: Tesla Gigafactory Berlin-Brandenburg
product: Model Y (+ planned 4680 cell production)

name: Northvolt Heide
product: Lithium-ion pouch cells for European OEMs (original plan: 60 GWh)

name: Volkswagen PowerCo Salzgitter
product: Unified Cell prismatic LFP/NMC cells for VW Group BEVs

name: Stellantis ACC Kaiserslautern Gigafactory
company: Automotive Cells Company (Stellantis / TotalEnergies / Mercedes-Benz JV)
product: NMC lithium-ion cells for Stellantis and Mercedes-Benz EVs (original plan: 13.4 GWh → 40 GWh)

name: SVOLT Überherrn Gigafactory
product: Lithium-ion cells (planned 24 GWh)

name: Ford Cologne Electric Vehicle Center
product: All-electric Ford Explorer + Ford Capri on MEB platform

name: CATL Thuringia Cell Plant (CATT) Arnstadt
product: Lithium-ion prismatic cells + modules for European OEMs (14 GWh)

name: Volkswagen Zwickau EV Plant
product: VW ID.3, ID.4, ID.5, Cupra Born, Audi Q4 e-tron (MEB)

name: Volkswagen Emden EV Plant
product: VW ID.4, ID.7, ID.7 Tourer (MEB)

name: BMW Leipzig Battery Component Expansion
product: High-voltage battery modules + assemblies (cell coating, module production, HV battery assembly for BMW BEVs)

name: BMW Group Plant Irlbach-Straßkirchen
product: High-voltage battery assembly for Neue Klasse BEVs (Gen6)

name: Gotion High-Tech Göttingen
product: Battery packs and modules (planned 20 GWh cell expansion; initial 5 GWh pack)

name: Mercedes-Benz Accumotive Kamenz Plant 2
product: Lithium-ion battery packs + modules for Mercedes EQ fleet

name: BASF Schwarzheide Cathode Active Materials Plant
product: High-nickel NCM cathode active materials (CAM) for EV batteries

name: Mercedes-Benz eCampus Stuttgart-Untertürkheim
product: Next-gen cell chemistry development + Industrial Cell Lab (pilot production) + battery ramp-up factory

name: Porsche V4Smart Nördlingen Cell Plant
company: V4Smart GmbH (Porsche AG majority, VARTA AG minority)
product: Ultra-high-performance cylindrical lithium-ion booster cells (Porsche 911 Carrera GTS hybrid)

name: Microvast Ludwigsfelde
product: Lithium-ion cells + packs for commercial vehicles and buses

name: Stellantis Eisenach Assembly Plant (BEV line)
product: Opel Grandland Electric + Vauxhall Grandland Electric (STLA Medium platform)

name: Valmet Automotive Kirchardt Battery Plant
product: High-voltage battery systems for EV and plug-in hybrid OEMs

name: Kedali Germany Erfurt Precision Components Plant
product: Aluminum precision structural components + cell housings for lithium-ion batteries (supplier to CATL Arnstadt)

name: CATL Debrecen Battery Cell Gigafactory
product: Lithium-ion prismatic battery cells for European OEMs (Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Stellantis); initial 40 GWh / planned 100 GWh

name: BYD Szeged EV Assembly Plant
product: BYD passenger BEVs and PHEVs for European market (initial 150,000 vehicles/year → 300,000)

name: SK On Iváncsa Battery Cell Plant
product: NCM pouch battery cells for European OEMs (Ford, VW); 30 GWh annual capacity

name: BMW Group Plant Debrecen
product: BMW iX3 and Neue Klasse BEVs (first vehicle plant dedicated to Neue Klasse); includes Gen6 high-voltage battery assembly on site

name: SK On Komárom Battery Cell Plant
product: NCM pouch battery cells (gen-3) for European OEMs; 7.5 GWh across 5 assembly lines
